de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

Class ChoiceSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.ChoiceSettings
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Settings, Cloneable

    public class ChoiceSettings
extends Object
implements Settings, Cloneable

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private HashMap<String,Set<String>> category2Choices
      maps categories to a set of Strings(representing the choices which are options for this category).
      private HashMap<String,String> category2Default 
      private static String DEFAULTCHOICES_KEY 
      private LinkedList<SettingsListener> listenerList 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ChoiceSettings() 
      ChoiceSettings(HashMap<String,String> category2Default) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addSettingsListener(SettingsListener l)
      adds a listener to the settings object
      private ImmutableSet<Choice> choiceMap2choiceSet(HashMap<String,String> ccc) 
      protected void fireSettingsChanged()
      sends the message that the state of this setting has been changed to its registered listeners (not thread-safe)
      HashMap<String,Set<String>> getChoices()
      returns a copy of the HashMap that maps categories to their choices.
      HashMap<String,String> getDefaultChoices()
      returns a copy of the HashMap that maps categories to their default choices.
      ImmutableSet<Choice> getDefaultChoicesAsSet()
      returns the current selected choices as set
      void readSettings(Object sender, Properties props)
      gets a Properties object and has to perform the necessary steps in order to change this object in a way that it represents the stored settings
      void setDefaultChoices(HashMap<String,String> category2Default) 
      void updateChoices(Namespace choiceNS, boolean remove)
      updates category2Choices if new entries are found in choiceNS or if entries of category2Choices are no longer present in choiceNS
      ChoiceSettings updateWith(ImmutableSet<Choice> sc) 
      void writeSettings(Object sender, Properties props)
      implements the method required by the Settings interface.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

        public HashMap<String,Set<String>> getChoices()
        returns a copy of the HashMap that maps categories to their choices.

        public HashMap<String,String> getDefaultChoices()
        returns a copy of the HashMap that maps categories to their default choices.

        public ImmutableSet<Choice> getDefaultChoicesAsSet()
        returns the current selected choices as set

      • choiceMap2choiceSet

        private ImmutableSet<Choice> choiceMap2choiceSet(HashMap<String,String> ccc)

      • updateChoices

        public void updateChoices(Namespace choiceNS,
                 boolean remove)
        updates category2Choices if new entries are found in choiceNS or if entries of category2Choices are no longer present in choiceNS
        Parameters:
        remove - remove entries not present in choiceNS

      • fireSettingsChanged

        protected void fireSettingsChanged()
        sends the message that the state of this setting has been changed to its registered listeners (not thread-safe)

      • readSettings

        public void readSettings(Object sender,
                Properties props)
        gets a Properties object and has to perform the necessary steps in order to change this object in a way that it represents the stored settings
        Specified by:
        readSettings in interface Settings

      • writeSettings

        public void writeSettings(Object sender,
                 Properties props)
        implements the method required by the Settings interface. The settings are written to the given Properties object. Only entries of the form < key > = < value > (,< value >)* are allowed.
        Specified by:
        writeSettings in interface Settings
        Parameters:
        props - the Properties object where to write the settings as (key, value) pair

      • updateWith

        public ChoiceSettings updateWith(ImmutableSet<Choice> sc)

      • addSettingsListener

        public void addSettingsListener(SettingsListener l)
        adds a listener to the settings object
        Specified by:
        addSettingsListener in interface Settings
        Parameters:
        l - the listener
